content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/build/pull/44

**Summary of changes:**

- **Root cause:** `.timer-widget` had `flex: 1; min-width: 0`, so two timer widgets were forced side-by-side on mobile (~150px each), too narrow for their contents (label + display + 2 buttons).

- **Fix:** Changed to `flex: 1 1 14rem` — the `14rem` flex-basis triggers the parent's `flex-wrap` on screens narrower than ~450px, stacking the widgets vertically. On wider viewports they remain side-by-side.

- **Test:** Added an e2e test that verifies timer widgets don't overflow their container and maintain >200px width on the 375x667 mobile viewport.

- All 84 tests pass (chromium desktop + mobile).
